data.title: Restaurant Review System
data.goal: Building a CRUD-based review platform with data simulation.
features: Enhanced code reusability via Thymeleaf layout separation
Implemented access control using Spring Security
Conducted data testing with 1,800 Stored Procedure records

data.title: Car Renting Service
data.goal: Real-time rental platform with a data-driven admin dashboard.
features: Implemented real-time vehicle search, multi-criteria filtering, and booking flows for users.
Developed an admin dashboard for inventory control, reservation tracking, and data visualization.
Optimized search performance by implementing MyBatis Dynamic SQL for complex queries.
Designed a robust API architecture using Axios Interceptors for global error handling.
Deployed the full-stack ecosystem using Cloudtype PaaS for stable live service operation.
